source.title: Mid DevOps Engineer
source.content_text:
Mid DevOps Engineer
Location: Melbourne, VIC
Company: Harbor Stack

We are hiring a Mid DevOps Engineer to improve CI/CD reliability across our Azure environment. You will automate Docker-based build pipelines, manage Terraform for infrastructure changes, and extend Grafana dashboards for delivery visibility. Python is used for release tooling and deployment helpers.
